chapter_title.en: Chapter on Miscellaneous Narrations Regarding Tawaf.

parts.text: 2846 - وَ رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

text: : «يُسْتَحَبُّ أَنْ تُحْصِيَ أُسْبُوعَكَ فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ وَ لَيْلَةٍ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2846 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Imam (as) that he said:
"It is recommended to count your weekly circumambulations (Tawaf) for each day and night."
